content: Maydanchik, Joseph S. Shapiro, and Felix Tintelnot find that the net social benefits of these subsidies were moderate compared with their costs. The researchers estimate that the EV incentive program generated $1.87 of US benefits per dollar spent in 2023 when they compare this program with the pre-IRA structure of incentives, but only $1.02 when compared with a no-subsidy baseline.
